page_metadata.biotools__summary: BayesMotif is a de novo identification algorithm for finding a common type of protein sorting motifs in which a highly conserved anchor is present along with a less conserved motif regions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BayesMotif is a de novo identification algorithm for finding a common type of protein sorting motifs in which a highly conserved anchor is present along with a less conserved motif regions.
